prompt: Create a nostalgic analog-film summer memory photograph of a Japanese schoolgirl standing in side profile on a quiet rural coastal road, facing right toward the sea. She has straight shoulder-length black hair and wears a classic white short-sleeve sailor school uniform blouse with navy collar and necktie, and a dark navy pleated skirt. Place a solid pixelated square censor block over her face, matching the muted brown skin-tone colors, so her identity is obscured. The setting is an old Japanese seaside village: one weathered wooden house with tiled eaves and windows on the left, overgrown summer grasses along the wall, a narrow sunlit asphalt lane receding into the distance, trees casting dappled shadows on the road, a utility pole near the center background, and a blue ocean or lake with low hills visible beyond the road. Use bright midday summer light, soft haze, warm faded colors, film grain, slight blur, subtle vignette, 1970s/1980s snapshot aesthetic, square 1:1 composition, imperfect focus, dreamy melancholy mood, like an old family photo titled memories of summer. No visible text, no watermark, no modern objects.
